topic: Circuit Breaker Pattern (Resilience4j in real life)

scenes.narration: Bhai sun, ye Circuit Breaker Pattern (Resilience4j in real life) ki ek mistake teri ₹30-50LPA ki PhonePe offer cancel kara dega.
Without understanding Circuit Breaker Pattern (Resilience4j in real life), systems fail at scale. Here's why it matters.
Think of Circuit Breaker Pattern (Resilience4j in real life) like a traffic cop at a busy intersection — directing flow efficiently.
The core mechanism of Circuit Breaker Pattern (Resilience4j in real life): it distributes work, manages state, and handles failures gracefully.
Key properties of Circuit Breaker Pattern (Resilience4j in real life): fault tolerance, horizontal scalability, and low latency.
Real-world example: companies like Netflix and Uber use Circuit Breaker Pattern (Resilience4j in real life) to serve millions of users daily.
Quick recap: Circuit Breaker Pattern (Resilience4j in real life) solves scale. Remember: distribute, monitor, and failover. That's the pattern.
